hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | (read -r f; if [ -z "$f" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$f" in *src/content/modules/*|*src/content/learning-paths/*|*/docs/*|docs/*) exit 0 ;; esac; printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"This change may need a docs update - check docs/ for anything it affects (skip if this was just adding module/learning-path content)."}}')
